description: This command hides or un-hides all nodes in the range. By default, commands that use a range filter will skip hidden objects. This can be overruled with the use-hidden keyword in the range specification.

keywords.name: adummy
keywords.description: if a boolean type is specified and if on , it hides all nodes in the range. If off , it un-hides (or shows) all elements in the range, and the use-hidden keyword is applied to the range implicitly. on is the default if no keyword is given.

keywords.name: undo
keywords.description: this will reverse the operation of the last structure node hide command. FLAC3D keeps a maximum undo stack of size 12.
